title: Derived Component Field
text: Derived Component Field A Derived Component Field references a Modeled Field and initially inherits its properties and code containers. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: fld Main Development Object? No Part of: Derived Component Entity Contains: Value, Property , Code Container Generalization: Component Field Specializations: — Compilation Output — URI format: cpt: ComponentName :ent: FieldName :fld: FieldName Specialization A derived field specializes Component Field in the following ways: It has a derived entity as parent. It references a Modeled Field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
